provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Whistleblowing Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: a public officer whose office is created under section 124 of the Constitution
a person authorised under section 8 to receive a disclosure of impropriety
the Botswana Defence Force established under the Botswana Defence Force Act (Cap. 21:05)
the Botswana Police Service established under the Police Act (Cap. 21:01)
Botswana Prisons Services established under the Prisons Act (Cap. 21:03)
the Botswana Unified Revenue Service established under the Botswana Unified Revenue Service Act (Cap. 53:03)
the Competition Authority established under the Competition Authority Act (Cap. 46:09)
the Directorate of Intelligence and Security established under the Intelligence and Security Service Act (Cap. 23:02)

definitions.term: Directorate on Corruption and Economic Crime
definitions.definition: the Directorate on Corruption and Economic Crime established under the Corruption and Economic Crime Act (Cap. 08:05)

any declaration of information made by a whistleblower with regard to the conduct of one or more persons where the whistleblower has reason to believe that the information given shows or tends to show an impropriety

any person who has entered into a contract of employment for the hire of his or her labour in terms of the Public Service Act (Cap. 26:01), Employment Act (Cap. 47:01), Botswana Defence Force Act (Cap. 21:05), Police Act (Cap. 21:01) or Prisons Act (Cap. 21:03), and includes—
( a ) any person who provides a service for reward to a public body
the Financial Intelligence Agency established under the Financial Intelligence Act (Cap. 08:07)
conduct which falls within any of the matters specified in section 3
